title: citrus × panuban
intro: Citrus × panuban, also known as the lemon-scented gum, is a hybrid plant between the lemon (Citrus limon) and the gum tree (Corymbia citriodora). The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including antiseptic, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Citrus × panuban include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. The plant's essential oil can be obtained through steam distillation and is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and topical creams, to promote overall well-being.
